primary_accounting_issue: Définition IFRS du critère des flux de trésorerie contractuels constitués uniquement de remboursements de principal et d’intérêts (SPPI) pour la classification des actifs financiers

authority_resolution.selection_reason: I applied the strict precedence rule by selecting the IFRS standard that directly governs financial asset classification and the SPPI condition; no overlapping lower-precedence governing document remains in the candidate set.
authority_resolution.residual_uncertainty: Low uncertainty, because the cited IFRS 9 paragraphs directly define principal, interest and the SPPI assessment used for classification.

primary_authority.reason: These paragraphs directly define the SPPI condition and how it determines the classification basis for financial assets.

supporting_authority.reason: These paragraphs complete the top-level classification models by identifying fair value through profit or loss as the residual category and the fair value option.
These paragraphs illustrate and constrain how the SPPI definition is applied through examples of qualifying and non-qualifying contractual terms.

peripheral_authority.reason: These paragraphs relate to derecognition and transfer mechanics rather than identifying peer classification approaches for SPPI.
These agenda decisions address equity instrument presentation issues rather than the SPPI definition for debt-type financial assets.

treatment_families.family: Financial assets with contractual cash flows that are solely payments of principal and interest and held to collect contractual cash flows
Financial assets with contractual cash flows that are solely payments of principal and interest and held both to collect contractual cash flows and to sell
Financial assets that do not fall into an SPPI-based measurement category or are designated to eliminate an accounting mismatch

approaches.label: Amortised cost
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies this as a top-level measurement category for financial assets that meet the SPPI condition and are held in a hold-to-collect business model.

approaches.label: Fair value through other comprehensive income
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies this as a top-level measurement category for financial assets that meet the SPPI condition and are held in a collect-and-sell business model.

approaches.label: Fair value through profit or loss
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies this as the remaining top-level measurement category when the SPPI-based categories do not apply or when the fair value option is used.
